summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dubai Travel Assistant iteration 2. All new features tested successfully including message aggregation, supervisor panel, escalation flow, and complete booking integration. Backend APIs 100% passing, frontend 98% successful with full HITL workflow validated.

ui_bugs.issue: Conversation history section not displaying properly on empty sessions

design_issues.issue: Escalation notice background color slightly off from expected amber (showing rgb(255, 251, 235) instead of pure amber)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/chat with aggregated multi-line messages handles correctly
Backend: Helicopter tour triggers escalation response correctly
Backend: Burj Khalifa returns complete activity_info with images and policies
Backend: Complete desert safari booking flow with confirmation
Backend: Supervisor reply stores and appears in conversations
Frontend: Chat loads with WhatsApp theme and welcome message
Frontend: User messages send and bot responses with activity cards
Frontend: Message aggregation (2.5s debounce) with 'Collecting messages...' indicator
Frontend: Typing indicator shows while bot processing
Frontend: Escalation notice displays with amber styling for helicopter tour
Frontend: Supervisor Panel loads with form and reply functionality
Frontend: Supervisor reply form submits and shows success message
Frontend: Supervisor messages appear in customer chat via polling (5s intervals)
Frontend: Book Now button on activity cards fills input correctly
Frontend: Complete booking confirmation displays with all details
Frontend: Activity cards display with images, pricing, and variations
Frontend: Status indicators (typing, listening, online) work correctly
